Good place to stop along the route, rest and restock.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNneF9ydDVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malisima la atención ,solo acepta efectivo nomás,no trabaja con el servicio YPF SERVICLUB ,Cierra a las 20 hs el negocito que vende agua y dos cosas mas y los cigarrillos estan 10 pesos más caros de lo normal,surtidores de la epoca del 1900 tiene.

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible, they only accept cash, they don't work with the YPF SERVICLUB service, the little shop that sells water and a couple of other things closes at 8 pm, and cigarettes are 10 pesos more expensive than normal; they have pumps from the 1900s.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdklycnNBRRAB
